scripts.coverage:server: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:PATH=\"$env:USERPROFILE\go\bin;$env:PATH\"; Set-Location server; xgo go ./...; go test \"-coverprofile=coverage.out\" ./api ./application ./domain ./infrastructure/provider/failing ./infrastructure/provider/local ./infrastructure/provider/mock ./infrastructure/storage; go tool cover \"-func=coverage.out\""
scripts.test:e2e: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$env:PW_CHROME_CHANNEL=\"1\"; pnpm --dir app/web exec playwright test"
scripts.test:all: pnpm test:server && pnpm coverage:server && pnpm build:web && pnpm test:web && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.install:browsers: pnpm --dir app/web exec playwright install chromium
